[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0101000100 3
1 0011010000 3
2 0110110000 4
3 1000000001 2
4 0010000000 1
5 0000000010 1
6 0001001001 3
7 0001111000 4

01 10 0000101000 2
12 21 0000000000 a
23 32 1000000111 4
34 43 0001001000 2
45 54 0001101000 3
56 65 0101000100 3 match 0
67 76 1110010100 5
70 07 1000100000 2

02 20 1000000001 2 match 3
13 31 0000001000 1
24 42 0000000000 a
35 53 0001001100 3
46 64 0001010000 2
57 75 0100100100 3
60 06 1000000001 2 match 3
71 17 0010100000 2

03 30 1000001001 3
14 41 0000101000 2
25 52 0100000100 2
36 63 1001000101 4
47 74 0000110000 2
50 05 0000101000 2
61 16 0010000000 1 match 4
72 27 1100000110 4

04 40 0000101000 2
15 51 0000101000 2
26 62 1100000101 4
37 73 1000000110 3
